overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The character moves from under a massive overpass through a busy intersection with towering digital billboards, featuring atmospheric lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the large metal overpass structure

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past on the wet road with headlights on
woman in red jacket walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive steel beam framework of the transit overpass covering the street
construction barriers with alternating yellow and black stripes lining the walkway
thick support pillars for the overpass structure
tall industrial street lamp casting bright light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-sheltered sidewalk beneath a massive metal overpass. Construction barriers line the right side while vehicles pass on the left. The environment is artificially lit by street lamps with a misty, rainy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with towering digital billboards

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into the open intersection with massive digital billboards visible ahead
character pauses at the crosswalk corner observing passing vehicles before crossing

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, stopping at the corner, then beginning to cross while looking up at the towering advertisements

notable_agents.action: character in white pants standing at the corner waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying Cirrus advertisement high above the street
large illuminated billboard with Cola branding and product image
large advertisement billboard with provocative imagery and text
red street sign mounted on the traffic light pole indicating Palm View Way

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens into a vast intersection dominated by towering digital billboards for Cirrus and Cola. The character stops at the corner near a Palm View Way sign, then crosses the wet street as neon lights reflect off the rain-soaked asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and vendors

events.description: character with glowing blue umbrella enters frame and walks alongside the player character

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk passing by a character with a glowing blue umbrella who walks ahead

notable_agents.action: character holding a glowing blue illuminated umbrella walking alongside then moving ahead

entered.detail: various glowing neon signs and awnings for ground-level shops
small commercial stall with bright lighting and signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the commercial street, a character with a distinctive glowing blue umbrella walks alongside before moving ahead. Neon storefront signs illuminate the right side while the Bawdy Dog billboard recedes into the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk with mixed retail storefronts

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past various pedestrians and storefronts, observing the neon-lit urban environment

entered.detail: red neon signage indicating a food establishment
tall modern building with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the busy sidewalk past various neon-lit storefronts and pedestrians. The Bawdy Dog billboard is left behind as the street continues with commercial establishments and a food court sign visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered gloom of an industrial overpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched expanse of a commercial city center. It begins on a rain-sheltered sidewalk beneath a massive metal structure, moving past construction barriers and passing vehicles amidst a misty, artificial glow. As the camera emerges from the overpass, the environment opens into a vast intersection dominated by towering digital billboards for Cirrus and Cola, where the character crosses wet asphalt reflecting brilliant neon lights. The scene then shifts further down the commercial street, passing a pedestrian with a glowing blue umbrella while the Bawdy Dog billboard recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera proceeds along the busy sidewalk past a series of illuminated storefronts and pedestrians, moving toward a distant food court sign.
